summary: Documentation-only PR removing the `un`/Unknown row from the module abbreviation table in `.github/README.md`. The deleted row stated that `un` was not an actual folder in the original code.

key_files.role: Updated module abbreviation documentation by deleting the `un`/Unknown entry.

what_changed.text: Removed the README table row `` `un`|Unknown|This isn't an actual folder in the original code.`` from the module abbreviation list.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:.github/README.md deleted line `un`|Unknown|This isn't an actual folder in the original code.

smart_moves.text: Kept the change narrowly scoped to documentation: one deleted line in `.github/README.md`, with no source or data edits.

decomp_lessons.text: Module abbreviation documentation should avoid listing labels that are explicitly not actual original-code folders.
evidence_refs: deleted row text: This isn't an actual folder in the original code.

naming_conventions.text: The PR removes `un` as a documented short module name for `Unknown`; it does not establish a replacement name.

follow_up_queries: Search current docs for remaining `un` module references before treating this as a global path fact.
Check source tree/path metadata if curator wants to record whether `un` is absent as an original-code folder.

notes: Evidence is strong for the mechanical documentation change.
There is no PR body, review discussion, or issue comment explaining broader rationale.
The deleted row itself says `un` is not an actual folder, but because the PR removes that row rather than adding a new explanatory statement, broader path-fact promotion should be curator-reviewed.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Do not document non-folder labels as module abbreviations
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2555 removed the `un`/Unknown entry from `.github/README.md`'s module abbreviation table; the removed row stated it was not an actual folder in the original code. This supports a narrow lesson to keep module docs aligned with actual original-code folder/module structure.

source_update_candidates.title: Curate whether `un` should be excluded from documented module abbreviations
source_update_candidates.text: Consider recording that `un` should not be listed as a module abbreviation in repository documentation. PR 2555 removed the README row `` `un`|Unknown|This isn't an actual folder in the original code.``
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a possible documentation/path-fact update, but the PR slice contains no body or review discussion, so the curator should verify current source-tree/path facts before promoting it.

rejection_notes: No assembly, matching, verification, objdiff, or source-code tactic lesson is supported by this PR slice.
Do not infer a replacement module name or broader source layout rule from this PR alone.
Do not claim reviewer intent; there were no reviews or comments in the loaded evidence.
